data.name: Groza

weaponImprint.name: OTs-14
weaponImprint.trait: At the end of the action, if under the effects of 3 or more stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], restores 1 point of Stability Index.
weaponImprint.effect: Every 4/3/3/3/2/1 time(s) [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] is applied, increases damage dealt by the next active skill by 10%/12%/15%/18%/20%/20%.

data.effects: A mature and composed elite Doll, she is undeniably the squad's core. Despite the squad members' diverse personalities, she seamlessly unites their strengths. With her presence, nothing will become a problem.

skills.name: Fire Command
skills.description: Selects 1 target within 7 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack.

skills.name: Timely Maintenance
skills.description: When an allied unit (excluding this unit) ends their action within 7 tiles, grants 1 point of Confectance Index and applies 1 stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] to both the allied unit and this unit. For each stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], Groza's damage increases by 5%. If an enemy within 6 tiles deals targeted damage to an allied unit, Groza retaliates with a [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to them, as well as 4 points of stability damage. This can be triggered at most once per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: When an allied unit (excluding this unit) ends their action within 7 tiles, gains 1 point of Confectance Index and applies 1 stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] to both the allied unit and this unit. For each stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], Groza's damage increases by 5%. If an enemy within 6 tiles deals targeted damage to an allied unit, Groza launches a [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack, as well as 4 points of stability damage to them. This can be triggered at most once per turn. At the end of the action, applies [effect:c31427f8-0642-4467-a4c1-b646db070425] to the enemy with the highest attack within 7 tiles for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3: When an allied unit (excluding Groza) ends their action within 7 tiles, Groza gains 1 point of Confectance Index and applies 1 stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] to both the allied unit and Groza. When Groza is under the effects of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], reduces stability damage taken by 1 point. For each stack accumulated, Groza's damage increases by 5%. If an enemy within 6 tiles deals targeted damage to an allied unit, Groza launches a [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to them, as well as 4 points of stability damage. This can be triggered at most once per turn. At the end of the action, applies [effect:c31427f8-0642-4467-a4c1-b646db070425] to the enemy with the highest attack within 7 tiles for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: At the end of the action, applies [effect:c31427f8-0642-4467-a4c1-b646db070425] to the enemy with the highest attack within 7 tiles for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: When possessing [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], reduce stability damage taken by 1 point.

skills.name: Heavy Suppression
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to them and applies [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 130% of attack, and applies [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] to them for 1 turn. If this causes the enemy to enter Stability Break, gains 1 point of Confectance Index and recovers 4 points of stability.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If Stability Break is dealt, the user gains 1 point of Confectance Index and recovers 4 points of stability index.

skills.name: Perfect Cover
skills.description: Applies 2 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] and [effect:e8b188c4-e3be-4dee-8708-82b8ac81726e] to all allied targets within 6 tiles for 2 turns. Gains 1 point of Confectance Index for each allied target within range. Increases the [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] count by 2 for the turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Restores 5 points of stability index. Applies 2 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] and [effect:e8b188c4-e3be-4dee-8708-82b8ac81726e] to all allied targets within 6 tiles for 2 turns. Gains 1 point of Confectance Index for each allied target within range. Increases the [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] count by 2 for the turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Restores 5 points of stability index.

skills.name: Explosive Bombardment
skills.description: Select 1 tile within 7 tiles of the user to launch an attack, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy targets within a 3x3 area and applying [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 tile within 7 tiles of the user to launch an attack, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets within a 3x3 area and applying [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Select 1 tile within 7 tiles of the user to launch an attack, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets within a 3x3 area and applying [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Extends the duration of [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] by 1 turn.

keys.effect: When [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] is active, immune to displacement for 1 time. Has a cooldown of 1 turn.
When using the active skill Perfect Cover, gains [effect:22ae7ba7-93e8-4bad-8476-debb40fa628e].
If a Stability Break occurs, applies [effect:2243d1e2-882f-40cc-9709-05d95980f966] and [effect:c31427f8-0642-4467-a4c1-b646db070425], lasting for 1 turn.
When using Perfect Cover, additionally applies [effect:90e40fd3-e06c-4dca-aa63-464cf6e0c9f7] for 1 turn.
When self HP is below 30%, increase healing received by 50%.
If Heavy Suppression causes the enemy target to enter Stability Break, applies [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] to them for 1 turn.
When the user is under the effects of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], reduces AoE damage taken by 20%.
During Stability Break, restores 20% self max HP, 5 points of stability index, and cleanse 4 debuffs from self. Triggers only once per battle.

vertebrae.effect: If Stability Break is dealt, the user gains 1 point of Confectance Index and recovers 4 points of stability index.

doll.name: Groza
doll.effects: A mature and composed elite Doll, she is undeniably the squad's core. Despite the squad members' diverse personalities, she seamlessly unites their strengths. With her presence, nothing will become a problem.

imagoforms.effect: Defense for all allied units with shelter is increased by 5%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
When not protected by cover, damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Max Hp is increased by 8%.
When stability is greater than 0, damage taken by allied units (not including this unit) is reduced by 2%. This effect can stack up to 3 times.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Immune to basic attacks and skill damage. The immunity is removed after receiving 1 basic attack or skill attack. This is considered a buff.
